Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the notifications icon in the top bar
Then the app navigates to the Notifications screen and displays the user's notifications list

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user taps the Edit Profile button
Then the app displays the Edit Profile form allowing the user to update their account details

Given the user is on the Bookings screen
When the user taps on a specific booking in the list
Then the app navigates to the Booking Details screen and displays the details for the selected booking

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user receives a new notification while the app is open
Then a badge appears on the notifications icon and the notification is listed on the Notifications screen

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user scrolls down to view their account information
Then the app displays the user's name, email, and other profile details correctly

Given the user is on the Notifications screen
When the user swipes down to refresh the list
Then the app reloads and displays the most up-to-date notifications for the user

Given the user is on the Bookings screen
When the user taps the filter or sort option
Then the app displays filter and sort options and updates the bookings list according to the user's selection
